title: Remove tutorial link from README.md and move Install Instructions
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

I've removed the tutorial link as it was pointing to CRI-O's link.   @ipbabble  will be working on a tutorial and will add a link when it's complete, hopefully early next year.

Recently Buildah moved the install instructions into a separate page, I've done so for libpod.  I also moved the CNI Network there too as that felt more setup related.  @anarcat I think this addresses #114

comments.body:
@TomSweeneyRedHat When @mheon merges his patches for networking. we will need that CNI description.
Otherwise LGTM
@rhatdan I've put the CNI Network info on the install.md page.  It felt like it fits better there.  If you think it belong on the README.md still I'll move it back.
well, it "resolves" #114 in that it removes the broken link, but doesn't resolve the issue that there's no tutorial. :p
@TomSweeneyRedHat My mistake, I read the "I moved the CNI ..." as "I removed the CNI..."
@TomSweeneyRedHat You are being bitten by Whitespace.
Ugh!  A blank line at the end of the install.md caused the failure.

Anti-fragility ;-)

William Henry
Senior Consulting Software Engineer
Red Hat
Colorado, USA.

On Mon, Dec 11, 2017 at 2:41 PM, Tom Sweeney <notifications@github.com>
wrote:
